summary: Tested HHS MV Calculator implementation. The dynamic calculator correctly calculates actuarial value from plan parameters (deductible, coinsurance, copays, OOP max) using standard population costs ($12,500). All 11 backend tests pass. Frontend compliance popup correctly displays: Plan Parameters, Standard Population Cost Analysis, Service Category Breakdown table (8 categories), Monthly Premium Analysis with employer/employee split. MV percentages match expected values: Silver PPO ~64%, Gold HMO ~76%, Bronze HDHP ~47% (FAIL), Platinum PPO ~76% (FAIL due to 0.8% ER contrib), Standard EPO ~68%.
passed_tests: Backend: Silver PPO MV calculation returns ~64% (passes MV threshold)
Backend: Gold HMO MV calculation returns ~76% (passes MV threshold)
Backend: Bronze HDHP MV calculation returns ~47% (correctly FAILS MV threshold)
Backend: Platinum PPO MV calculation returns ~76% but FAILS due to 0.8% ER contribution
Backend: Standard EPO MV calculation returns ~68% (passes MV threshold)
Backend: MV response includes category_breakdown array with 8 service categories
Backend: MV response includes premium_analysis object with employer_pct and employer_contribution_pass
Backend: MV response includes plan_parameters object (deductible, coinsurance, oop_max)
Backend: MV response includes total_allowed_cost ($12,500), plan_pays, member_pays
Backend: MV response includes employer_contribution_pct and employer_contribution_pass fields
Backend: Compliance check updates stored mv_percentage in DB after calculation
Frontend: Compliance popup shows 'HHS MV Calculator' as method
Frontend: Compliance popup shows Plan Parameters section (Deductible, Coinsurance, OOP Max)
Frontend: Compliance popup shows Standard Population Cost Analysis (Total Allowed, Plan Pays, Member Pays)
Frontend: Compliance popup shows Service Category Breakdown table with 8 categories
Frontend: Compliance popup shows Monthly Premium Analysis with Employer/Employee split
Frontend: Silver PPO shows MV Pass badge (64.4%)
Frontend: Bronze HDHP shows MV Fail badge (47.1%)
Frontend: Platinum PPO shows MV Fail badge (76% but ER contrib 0.8% fails)
Frontend: Gold HMO shows MV Pass badge (75.7%)
Frontend: Plan card badges correctly display MV percentages and fail indicators
critical_code_review_comments: HHS MV Calculator in backend/services/mv_calculator.py correctly implements standard population cost methodology with $12,500 total allowed costs
Calculator properly handles 8 service categories: Inpatient, Outpatient, Physician, Specialist, ER, Generic Rx, Brand Rx, Lab/Imaging
OOP max capping is correctly applied when member costs exceed the limit (visible in Platinum PPO test)
Employer contribution check (>= 60%) is correctly enforced alongside actuarial value check
Frontend PlanLibraryPage.js correctly displays all HHS Calculator breakdown sections in compliance popup

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all HHS MV Calculator UI features working correctly)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing plans: Silver PPO (ac820c3c-4409-4818-82c5-55c8ba523ce9), Gold HMO (bc701f0b-29c4-4f37-ab42-ebb4f5fad085), Bronze HDHP (46ef441c-ab24-4a2d-a583-79f29ada5dcf), Platinum PPO (16739425-5a63-45d9-9fde-418724747016), Standard EPO (70cb740e-d7c1-4798-8ddc-035bfe79bbd5)
context_for_next_testing_agent: HHS MV Calculator feature fully tested and working. Key test data: Silver PPO (MV 64.4%, ER 77.8% - PASS), Gold HMO (MV 75.7%, ER 80.2% - PASS), Bronze HDHP (MV 47.1%, ER 78.1% - FAIL due to low actuarial value), Platinum PPO (MV 76%, ER 0.8% - FAIL due to low employer contribution), Standard EPO (MV 67.8%, ER 81% - PASS). The compliance check endpoint POST /api/enrollment/plans/{plan_id}/compliance-check returns detailed HHS Calculator breakdown including: category_breakdown (8 items), premium_analysis, plan_parameters, total_allowed_cost ($12,500), plan_pays, member_pays, employer_contribution_pct, employer_contribution_pass. Frontend compliance popup displays all these sections correctly.

verified_feature_details.feature_description: HHS MV Calculator dynamically calculates actuarial value from plan parameters
verified_feature_details.calculation_methodology: Uses standard population total allowed costs of $12,500 across 8 service categories. Applies deductible, copays, coinsurance, and OOP max to determine actuarial value.
ui_sections_verified: Standard Population Cost Analysis (Total Allowed, Plan Pays, Member Pays)
Service Category Breakdown table (8 categories with Cost, Copays, Plan, Member columns)
Monthly Premium Analysis (Total Premium, Employer Pays, Employee Pays, Employer Contribution %)
